hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: Several words start on the left side of the board.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: Look for short words that travel horizontally before dropping down.

hints.title: Almost there
hints.text: The bottom row can finish more than one answer path.

explanation: The clean rows are the quickest way into this archived Wend puzzle. Solve the obvious rows first, then use the remaining letters to confirm the answer set.
fastTip: Start with the straight rows and use them as anchors before checking any bends.
commonMistake: Do not overthink the row-based paths; the obvious left-edge starts are useful here.
difficultyNote: Easy because the strongest answer paths are mostly clean rows.
